name: glory-rs
description: Comandos unificados para el monorepo Rust + React

scripts.check: node scripts/run-cargo.mjs check && node scripts/run-cargo.mjs clippy && npm --prefix frontend run type-check
scripts.check:back: node scripts/run-cargo.mjs check && node scripts/run-cargo.mjs clippy
scripts.verify: node scripts/run-cargo.mjs check && node scripts/run-cargo.mjs clippy -- -D warnings && node scripts/run-cargo.mjs test && npm --prefix frontend run type-check
